artists表：
-- auto-generated definition
create table artists
(
    id               bigint unsigned auto_increment
        primary key,
    name             varchar(255)                              not null comment '歌手名字',
    fansCount        bigint unsigned default 0                 null comment '粉丝数量',
    monthlyListeners bigint unsigned default 0                 null comment '每月听众数',
    biography        text                                      null comment '个人简介',
    avatarUrl        varchar(500)                              null comment '歌手头像URL',
    createdAt        timestamp       default CURRENT_TIMESTAMP null
);

create index idx_name
    on artists (name);

-- 唯一约束：艺术家名称不可重复，用于通过 user.nickname 匹配 artists.name
ALTER TABLE artists ADD UNIQUE INDEX uk_name (name);


user表：
-- auto-generated definition
create table user
(
    id             int(11)       auto_increment primary key,
    userName       varchar(255)  not null comment '用户名',
    nickName       varchar(255)  not null comment '昵称',
    gender         varchar(4)    null default '未知' comment '性别',
    email          varchar(254)  not null comment '邮箱',
    password       varchar(255)  not null comment '密码',
    phone          varchar(11)   null comment '手机号',
    personalMotto  text          null comment '个性签名',
    profilePic     varchar(255)  null default 'static/datas/profilePic/default.jpg' comment '头像',
    is_artist      tinyint(1)    not null default 0 comment '是否为艺术家：0-否，1-是'
);


songs表：
-- auto-generated definition
create table songs
(
    id        bigint unsigned auto_increment
        primary key,
    artistId  bigint unsigned                     not null comment '所属歌手ID',
    title     varchar(255)                        not null comment '歌曲名称',
    coverUrl  varchar(500)                        null comment '专辑封面URL',
    fileUrl   varchar(500)                        not null comment '音频文件路径',
    lyrics    longtext                             null comment 'LRC格式歌词',
    duration  int unsigned                        null comment '时长(秒)',
    createdAt timestamp default CURRENT_TIMESTAMP null
);

create index idx_artist_id
    on songs (artistId);


playlists表
-- auto-generated definition
create table playlists
(
    id            bigint unsigned auto_increment comment '歌单唯一ID'
        primary key,
    userId        bigint unsigned                     not null comment '创建该歌单的用户ID',
    name          varchar(255)                        not null comment '歌单名称，如：我的深夜歌单',
    coverUrl      varchar(500)                        null comment '专辑封面URL',
    backgroundUrl varchar(500)                        null comment '歌单背景图URL',
    createdAt     timestamp default CURRENT_TIMESTAMP null comment '创建时间',
    type          tinyint   default 0                 null comment '0:用户自建, 1:系统推荐, 2:官方精选'
);

create index idx_user_id
    on playlists (userId);


playlist_songs表
-- auto-generated definition
create table playlist_songs
(
    id         bigint unsigned auto_increment
        primary key,
    playlistId bigint unsigned                     not null comment '歌单ID',
    songId     bigint unsigned                     not null comment '歌曲ID',
    addedAt    timestamp default CURRENT_TIMESTAMP null,
    constraint uk_playlist_song
        unique (playlistId, songId)
);


song_artist表（歌曲-艺术家关联表）
-- auto-generated definition
create table song_artist
(
    song_id   bigint unsigned not null comment '歌曲ID',
    artist_id bigint unsigned not null comment '艺术家ID',
    is_main   tinyint(1) default 1 null comment '1=主创, 0=feat/客串',
    primary key (song_id, artist_id)
);


albums表（专辑表）
-- auto-generated definition
create table albums
(
    id              bigint unsigned auto_increment primary key comment '专辑唯一ID',
    artistId        bigint unsigned not null comment '创建该专辑的艺术家ID',
    name            varchar(255) not null comment '专辑名称',
    coverUrl        varchar(500) null comment '专辑封面URL（本地）',
    coverNetworkUrl varchar(500) null comment '专辑封面URL（网络）',
    description     text null comment '专辑简介/描述',
    type            tinyint default 2 not null comment '专辑类型：0-单曲Single，1-EP，2-专辑Album，3-精选集Compilation',
    releaseDate     date null comment '发行日期',
    createdAt       timestamp default CURRENT_TIMESTAMP null comment '创建时间',
    index idx_artist_id (artistId),
    index idx_release_date (releaseDate),
    constraint fk_album_artist foreign key (artistId) references artists(id) on delete cascade
);


-- 各表新增网络图片URL字段
ALTER TABLE artists   ADD COLUMN avatarNetworkUrl     VARCHAR(500) NULL COMMENT '歌手头像URL（网络）' AFTER avatarUrl;
ALTER TABLE songs     ADD COLUMN coverNetworkUrl      VARCHAR(500) NULL COMMENT '专辑封面URL（网络）' AFTER coverUrl;
ALTER TABLE songs     ADD COLUMN albumId              BIGINT UNSIGNED NULL COMMENT '所属专辑ID' AFTER artistId;
ALTER TABLE songs     ADD COLUMN lyrics               LONGTEXT NULL COMMENT 'LRC格式歌词' AFTER fileUrl;
ALTER TABLE playlists ADD COLUMN coverNetworkUrl      VARCHAR(500) NULL COMMENT '歌单封面URL（网络）' AFTER coverUrl;
ALTER TABLE playlists ADD COLUMN backgroundNetworkUrl VARCHAR(500) NULL COMMENT '歌单背景图URL（网络）' AFTER backgroundUrl;


user_artist_follows表（用户关注艺人关系表）
create table user_artist_follows
(
    user_id   bigint                              not null comment '用户ID',
    artist_id bigint unsigned                     not null comment '艺人ID',
    created_at timestamp default CURRENT_TIMESTAMP null comment '关注时间',
    primary key (user_id, artist_id)
);


-- songs 表新增 external_source 和 external_id 字段，支持外部API歌曲
ALTER TABLE songs ADD COLUMN external_source VARCHAR(50) NULL COMMENT '外部来源（如 gdmusic）' AFTER lyrics;
ALTER TABLE songs ADD COLUMN external_id VARCHAR(100) NULL COMMENT '外部歌曲ID' AFTER external_source;

-- 用户播放历史表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_playback_history (
    id         BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id    BIGINT       NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
    song_id    BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL COMMENT '歌曲ID',
    artist_id  BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL COMMENT '歌手ID',
    played_at  DATETIME     DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '播放时间',
    INDEX idx_user_played (user_id, played_at),
    INDEX idx_song (song_id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='用户播放历史';

-- songs 表新增 pic_id 字段，存储外部封面图片ID用于重新获取
ALTER TABLE songs ADD COLUMN pic_id VARCHAR(100) NULL COMMENT '外部封面图片ID' AFTER external_id;

-- songs 表新增 lyrics_url 字段，存储外部歌词URL地址
ALTER TABLE songs ADD COLUMN lyrics_url VARCHAR(500) NULL COMMENT '歌词URL（外部歌词地址）' AFTER lyrics;
